dataset: ADE20k_Detecture (212 samples, 92% overlap with training images)
purpose: Confirm that Qwen LoRA training degrades inference-time segmentation quality
conclusions: Phase 1 plateaus by epoch 5 (mIoU=0.696). Additional Phase 1 epochs provide no benefit.
Phase 2 Qwen LoRA training DEGRADES inference mIoU by -0.153 (0.696 → 0.543).
Val mIoU=0.813 (teacher forcing) vs inference mIoU=0.543 → the 0.27 gap is the critical bottleneck.
The vision engine (projector + SAM) is solid. The language engine (Qwen inference) is the weak link.
Running 50 epochs of Phase 1 only would NOT help — the ceiling is reached at epoch 5.
